stateInfo.draft: This IGSN ID is a Draft. Metadata can be specified, but no information is publicly available.
stateInfo.findable: This IGSN ID is Findable. The IGSN ID is a citable URL that redirects to the RSpace landing page. The metadata is publicly available through the landing page, DataCite Commons and the DataCite APIs.
stateInfo.registered: This IGSN ID is Registered. The metadata is not publicly available through the RSpace landing page, DataCite Commons or the Public API, but is available through the Members API.

identifiers.missingDetails: Some required details are missing. To enable publishing, please fill them in.

polygonCard.inPolygonPointDescription: Optional: you can specify an In Polygon Point below. This is only required if the Polygon covers more than the half of the Earth's surface.
polygonCard.polygonDescription: You can add a Polygon to a Geolocation associated with an IGSN ID. A Polygon is made of 4 or more points that form a closed shape. The first and last points have the same coordinates, editing the first point will automatically update the last one.

create.body: An IGSN ID in Draft state will be created. No metadata will be made public at this stage.
create.title: You are about to create an Identifier

delete.body: The IGSN ID will be deleted, and this item will no longer have an IGSN ID associated with it. Do you want to proceed?
delete.title: You are about to delete this Identifier

publish.body:
The IGSN ID landing page, DataCite Commons, and the DataCite APIs will be updated with these changes.

Please ensure the IGSN ID metadata you provided does not contain any information you do not want to make public before publishing, as this action cannot be fully undone.

Do you want to proceed?
publish.title: You are about to publish this Identifier

retract.body:
The IGSN ID will be set to Registered. It will be removed from DataCite Commons and the Public API, and the landing page will not display any metadata.

The metadata will remain visible to other DataCite Members via the Member API.

Do you want to proceed?
retract.title: You are about to retract this Identifier

igsnManagement.idsDescription: The RSpace IGSN ID integration enables researchers to create, publish and update IGSN ID metadata all within Inventory. IGSN IDs describe material samples and features-of-interest, and are provided through the DataCite DOI infrastructure. To learn more, see the IGSN ID documentation.
igsnManagement.manageDescription: To access actions such as editing metadata and publishing, please use the Identifiers section of the Linked Item.
igsnManagement.registerDescription: You can register and associate an IGSN ID with an existing item in Inventory by selecting <kbd>Create new IGSN ID</kbd> under its <cite>Identifiers</cite> heading.

registered.subheader: An IGSN ID that has been retracted from public access.
